description: Build auth pages (login/signup) and the tasks dashboard with full CRUD. Includes creating the UI components for email/password authentication, the task list view, task creation form, inline editing, deletion, and toggle complete functionality. All pages use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and semantic HTML.
steps: Create app/login/page.tsx - login form with email/password fields, submits to Supabase Auth signInWithPassword, shows error messages, has link to /signup. Use semantic HTML (form, label, input, button) and responsive Tailwind classes.
Create app/signup/page.tsx - signup form with email/password fields, submits to Supabase Auth signUp, shows success/error messages, has link to /login. Same semantic HTML and Tailwind patterns.
Create app/login/actions.ts and app/signup/actions.ts - server actions for login and signup that use the server Supabase client, handle errors, and redirect on success

Update app/page.tsx to be the authenticated tasks dashboard. Fetch tasks from Supabase (server component), sorted by created_at desc. Display tasks with title, completion status (checkbox), edit and delete actions. Completed tasks have strikethrough styling.

Create a client component app/components/TaskList.tsx that receives tasks and handles: (a) toggling is_complete via checkbox with optimistic UI update, (b) inline title editing, (c) delete button that removes immediately
Create a client component app/components/AddTaskForm.tsx - form with a text input for title, validates non-empty before submitting, creates task via Supabase client, adds to list
Create app/actions.ts with server actions for: createTask, updateTask, deleteTask, toggleTask - all use the server Supabase client
Update app/layout.tsx metadata to title 'Task Manager' and description 'Personal task manager'
Add a sign-out button/link in the dashboard header that calls Supabase Auth signOut and redirects to /login
Verify build passes: npm run build
Verify lint passes: npm run lint
acceptance_criteria: app/login/page.tsx renders a login form with email and password fields
app/signup/page.tsx renders a signup form with email and password fields
Root page (/) shows the task dashboard for authenticated users
Tasks are fetched from Supabase and displayed sorted by created_at desc
User can add a task with a non-empty title
User can toggle task completion (checkbox updates is_complete)
User can edit a task title inline
Sign-out button exists and calls Supabase signOut
All pages use semantic HTML (header, main, form, section, nav) and responsive Tailwind classes
npm run lint passes (or only has non-critical warnings)
